text: Acme Logistics held a working session on the Q3 product roadmap. The team agreed to proceed and asked Priya to lead the effort, targeting delivery by January 15. Questions about budget and staffing were deferred to the next review.

Globex Media held a working session on the billing API migration. The team agreed to proceed and asked Marcus to lead the effort, targeting delivery by February 2. Questions about budget and staffing were deferred to the next review.

Initech Systems held a working session on the mobile app redesign. The team agreed to proceed and asked Dana to lead the effort, targeting delivery by March 9. Questions about budget and staffing were deferred to the next review.

Umbrella Health held a working session on the data-warehouse cutover. The team agreed to proceed and asked Wei to lead the effort, targeting delivery by April 21. Questions about budget and staffing were deferred to the next review.

Stark Industries held a working session on the customer-onboarding revamp. The team agreed to proceed and asked Sofia to lead the effort, targeting delivery by May 6. Questions about budget and staffing were deferred to the next review.

Wayne Freight held a working session on the pricing change. The team agreed to proceed and asked Jamal to lead the effort, targeting delivery by June 18. Questions about budget and staffing were deferred to the next review.

Wonka Foods held a working session on the EU market launch. The team agreed to proceed and asked Lena to lead the effort, targeting delivery by July 1. Questions about budget and staffing were deferred to the next review.
